style_note: This is Tile Africa's own name for what we've been calling 'Urban' - neutral greys, monochromatic, industrial-practical.
known_gaps: Confirmed: no built-in/inset bath exists anywhere in Tile Africa's Modern Metro collection - freestanding only.
Wall tile: Modern Metro's own collection has no wall tile at all. One matching grey wall tile found via general site search used as premium. Budget and mid wall tile options still need sourcing.
